entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: A group of highly nutritious small-seeded grasses known for low carbon footprint and resilience.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A type of millet used for managing diabetes.

entities.name: LOW CARBON FOOTPRINT
entities.description: Environmental attribute of millets indicating low greenhouse gas emissions.

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Environmental stress condition that millets can survive.

entities.name: MINIMAL WATER
entities.description: Environmental stress condition that millets can survive.

entities.name: GLYCAEMIC INDEX
entities.description: A value indicating the relative rise in blood glucose levels after consumption of a carbohydrate-containing food.

entities.name: DIABETES MELLITUS
entities.description: A metabolic disease characterized by high blood sugar levels.

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A research method that collates and critically analyzes multiple studies on a specific topic.

entities.name: META-ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical procedure for combining data from multiple studies.

entities.name: PROCESSING AND COOKING
entities.description: Methods of preparing millets that affect their Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: FASTING GLUCOSE LEVEL
entities.description: The concentration of glucose in the blood after an overnight fast.

entities.name: POST-PRANDIAL GLUCOSE LEVEL
entities.description: The concentration of glucose in the blood after eating.

entities.name: INSULIN INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the insulin response to a specific food.

entities.name: HBA1C
entities.description: Glycated hemoglobin, a marker for long-term blood glucose levels.

entities.name: MILLED RICE
entities.description: A processed staple crop used as a high GI control.

entities.name: REFINED WHEAT
entities.description: A processed staple crop used as a high GI control.

entities.name: JOB'S TEARS
entities.description: A type of millet with a low mean Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: FONIO
entities.description: A type of millet with a low mean Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: FOXTAIL MILLET
entities.description: A type of millet with a low mean Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: BARNYARD MILLET
entities.description: A type of millet with a low mean Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: TEFF
entities.description: A type of millet with a low mean Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A type of millet with an intermediate Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A type of millet with an intermediate Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: KODO MILLET
entities.description: A type of millet with an intermediate Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: LITTLE MILLET
entities.description: A type of millet with an intermediate Glycaemic Index.

entities.name: WHITE RICE
entities.description: A processed rice variety used for comparison.

entities.name: WHITE WHEAT BREAD
entities.description: A processed wheat product used for comparison.

entities.name: PRE-DIABETIC
entities.description: A health state where blood sugar is higher than normal but not yet high enough to be classified as diabetes.

entities.name: NON-DIABETIC
entities.description: A health state without diabetes.

entities.name: STANDARD GLUCOSE
entities.description: A control substance used in meta-analysis for GI comparison.
